POST /employees.raw_response:
{
  "positive": [
    {
      "name": "Create new employee with valid data",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/employees",
      "path_params": {},
      "query_params": {},
      "headers": {},
      "payload": {"firstName": "John", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "john.doe@example.com", "jobTitle": "Software Engineer"},
      "expected_status": 201,
      "description": "Create a new employee with valid data",
      "context_capture": {"enabled": true, "fields": ["id", "firstName", "lastName"], "store_as": "employee"}
    },
    {
      "name": "Create new employee with valid data and address",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/employees",
      "path_params": {},
      "query_params": {},
      "headers": {},
      "payload": {"firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "jane.doe@example.com", "jobTitle": "Marketing Manager", "address": {"street": "123 Main St", "city": "Anytown", "state": "CA", "zip": "12345"}},
      "expected_status": 201,
      "description": "Create a new employee with valid data and address",
      "context_capture": {"enabled": true, "fields": ["id", "firstName", "lastName"], "store_as": "employee"}
    },
    {
      "name": "Create new employee with valid data and phone number",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/employees",
      "path_params": {},
      "query_params": {},
      "headers": {},
      "payload": {"firstName": "Bob", "lastName": "Smith", "email": "bob.smith@example.com", "jobTitle": "Sales Representative", "phone": "+1 123 456 7890"},
      "expected_status": 201,
      "description": "Create a new employee with valid data and phone number",
      "context_capture": {"enabled": true, "fields": ["id", "firstName", "lastName"], "store_as": "employee"}
    }
  ],
  "negative": [

      "name": "Create new employee with missing first name",
      "method": "POST",

      "payload": {"lastName": "Doe", "email": "john.doe@example.com", "jobTitle": "Software Engineer"},

      "description": "Create a new employee with missing first name"
    },

      "path_params": {},
      "query_params": {},
      "headers": {},
      "payload": {"firstName": "John", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "invalid_email", "jobTitle": "Software Engineer"},
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Create a new employee with invalid email"
    },
    {
      "name": "Create new employee with missing job title",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/employees",
      "path_params": {},

      "expected_status": 400,

  "boundary": [
    {
      "name": "Create new employee with very long first name",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/employees",
      "path_params": {},
      "query_params": {},

      "expected_status": 201,
